Explanation: Counting occurrences in the Language column (counting both languages when multiple are listed), English appears most frequently. English occurs 13 times (e.g., 1932 Summer, 1948 Summer, 1956 Summer, 1976 Summer, 1980 Winter, 1984 Summer, 1988 Winter, 1994 Winter, 1996 Summer, 2000 Summer, 2002 Winter, 2010 Winter, 2012 Summer). Other languages appear fewer times (French 5; German 3; Japanese 3; Spanish 2; Russian 2; others 1 each). Thus, "english" is the most spoken.
